name: my-automaton
short_description: An autonomous agent MCP server for automation tasks
long_description: my-automaton is an MCP server that provides tools for web scraping, data extraction, and automated workflows. Connect any MCP-compatible client to leverage these capabilities.
logo_url_note: Logo URL (https://automation.songheng.vip/logo.png) currently returns HTTP 404. A valid logo image should be placed at that URL before publishing. Alternatively, a 1x1 PNG placeholder can be used temporarily.
author: Automaton Colony
